channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Top Kenyan Judges and Ex-IPOA Chair Attend JSC Interviews for Supreme Court Vacancy
item.description: On 28 April 2026, Kenya’s Judicial Service Commission (JSC) began interviews for a vacant Supreme Court judge position, following the passing of Judge Mohamed Ibrahim in December 2025. Among the candi...

item.title: Teacher Claims Psychiatric Injury After Alleged Food Attack by Students at Brisbane Boys' School
item.description: A teacher at Marist College Ashgrove in Brisbane has claimed she suffered a 'serious psychiatric injury' after being surrounded by up to 300 male students and pelted with food during a schoolyard inci...

item.title: Severe heatwave in India as El Niño likely to impact 2026 monsoon, IMD warns
item.description: India is currently experiencing an intense heatwave, with several cities in Maharashtra reporting temperatures above 45°C. Akola recorded the highest temperature in the country at 46.9°C, followed clo...

item.title: EFCC declares Halimat Tejuosho wanted over alleged fraud
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) has declared Halimat Tejuosho, a 41-year-old businesswoman from Abuja, wanted for an alleged case of obtaining money by false pretence. Tejuosho, wh...

item.title: Understanding the Complexities of Mother-Daughter Relationships in Asian Families
item.description: The article explores the pervasive stereotype of the 'tiger mother'—strict, demanding, and emotionally distant—popularised by Amy Chua's 2011 memoir, Battle Hymn of the Tiger Mother. While Chua's port...

item.title: Real-time high-resolution imaging of live cells enabled by AI-enhanced microscopy
item.description: Researchers at the University of California San Diego have developed a new AI-driven microscopy technique called unrolled blind-SIM (UBSIM) that allows scientists to observe live cells in real time wi...

item.title: Pakistan Army destroys Afghan Taliban posts in Chaman in response to unprovoked border aggression
item.description: Security forces of Pakistan carried out a successful operation in Balochistan’s Chaman sector on Tuesday and destroyed multiple Afghan Taliban posts. The action was taken in response to unprovoked agg...

item.title: GF Assemblers supports Tumbi Hospital with computers and sanitation facilities
item.description: GF Assemblers (GFA) has provided support to Pwani Regional Referral Hospital, commonly known as Tumbi Hospital, by donating four computers together with waste storage tanks. This initiative forms part...

item.title: Nina Wapendwa Muziki Faces Online Debate Over Her Gen Z Nanny's Outfit
item.description: YouTube couple Wapendwa Muziki are currently enjoying a vacation, and Nina has shared a fun TikTok clip showing her dancing closely with their Gen Z nanny. The video has sparked heated debate online b...

item.title: Victoria town council candidate continues campaign despite criminal history
item.description: Paul Hanlon, a candidate in the upcoming special election in the Town of Victoria, Newfoundland and Labrador, has stated he will continue his campaign despite an extensive criminal record and an impen...

item.title: Harry Styles and Zoë Kravitz Confirm Engagement
item.description: According to reports, popular British singer Harry Styles and American actress Zoë Kravitz are now officially engaged. Fans of both celebrities have been eagerly following their relationship, which ha...

item.title: How Wills and Trusts Can Safeguard Your Estate and Family
item.description: Estate planning is not just for the wealthy—it is crucial for anyone who wants to secure their family's future and manage their assets according to their wishes. Wills and trusts are two key instrumen...

item.title: Kejriwal Holds Satyagraha in Excise Policy Case After Paying Tribute to Gandhi at Rajghat
item.description: On April 28, 2026, Arvind Kejriwal, the national convenor of Aam Aadmi Party (AAP), visited Rajghat in New Delhi to pay homage to Mahatma Gandhi. His visit coincided with his announcement to boycott p...

item.title: Actor from 'Dances with Wolves' sentenced to life for sexual assaults on Indigenous women and girls
item.description: The actor known for his role in 'Dances with Wolves' has been sentenced to life imprisonment following a series of sexual assaults committed against Indigenous women and girls. The case has drawn nati...

item.title: Pakistan Projects 4% Economic Growth for FY26 Amid Improving Indicators
item.description: Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb on Tuesday informed that Pakistan’s economy is expected to expand by around four percent in the current fiscal year, which he described as a notable improvement ove...

item.title: Bandits Kill 11 and Injure Others in Gurbi, Katsina
item.description: For real, people for Gurbi community, Kankara LGA, Katsina State don face wahala as some bandits waka enter town, kill eleven people, and injure two others on April 26, 2026. The injured dem don carry...

item.title: Experts urge Tanzania to enact law for free maternal healthcare amid implementation gaps
item.description: In Tanzania, expectant mothers continue to face charges for medical services despite the National Health Policy of 2007 which clearly states that maternal healthcare should be provided free of charge....

item.title: Pakistan and Sri Lanka Begin Bilateral Counter-Terrorism Exercise Shake Hands-II in Tarbela
item.description: Pakistan Army and Sri Lankan Army have started a two-week joint counter-terrorism exercise named Pakistan–Sri Lanka Bilateral Exercise Shake Hands-II at Tarbela. The exercise commenced on 27th April a...

item.title: Student Faces Large Funding Repayment Due to Administrative Error
item.description: A student in the UK has encountered a significant financial challenge due to an administrative funding error. The student was unexpectedly issued a bill totaling £163,180, a sum large enough to potent...

item.title: Federal Liberals to Release Spring Economic Update Highlighting Lower Deficit and New Initiatives
item.description: The federal Liberals are set to present their spring economic update, with Prime Minister Mark Carney signalling a smaller-than-expected deficit. The budget released last November projected a $78.3 bi...
